CH-COUNTER-1.exact_quote: Custodian may designate a distribution unsupported for operational convenience even though Customer has not declined support and law does not prohibit it; Customer is credited 0%, and Custodian retains 0%. Custodian posts a distribution notice within 21 days and keeps the claim workflow open for 60 days.
CH-COUNTER-1.proposed_redline: Unless Customer expressly declines support or applicable law prohibits support, Customer is entitled to forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and similar network distributions attributable to Customer Assets.

CH-NEW-DEVIATION.exact_quote: Custodian may pledge or rehypothecate Customer Assets for its own account without Customer consent.
CH-NEW-DEVIATION.proposed_redline: Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets, and Custodian will not lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, or use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account without Customer's prior written consent.

CH-REGRESSION.exact_quote: Custodian will maintain commercially reasonable crime and technology coverage, with policy amounts, deductibles, exclusions, and covered causes determined by Custodian from time to time.
CH-REGRESSION.proposed_redline: Custodian will maintain insurance covering theft, cyber compromise, insider misconduct, and key-loss events affecting Customer Assets with limits of at least the greater of $50,000,000 or the value of Customer Assets under custody.

CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties. Custodian's portal status page will be the exclusive source for operational-control information, and Custodian has no duty to provide supplemental evidence after incidents or control changes.
CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.proposed_redline: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties.
